message.content:
@startuml
actor Guest
participant "Mobile" as Mobile #D3D3F0 
participant Server  #D3D3F0  
database Mongo   #D3D3F0 

Guest ->> Mobile : Nhập Thông tin đăng ký


alt [Kiểm tra input (true)]
    alt [valdateDataApi (false)]
        note over Mobile,Server: Data Không hợp lệ
        
       
     else
    
      end
      
    
   
     
       activate Server
     
         Server->>+Mongo: Kiểm tra tồn tại userName
         
          deactivate MongoDB
          
           return thông tin user
            
            if[user tồn tại(true) ] then
                
                note right of server: UserName tồi tại
                    
                
             endif
             
              create new User
              
               loop Tạo otp
               
                  MailService -->MailService: mail otp
                  
                   break
                        
                    destroy TokenService
                    
                     participant UserService
                     
                      group Create Account
                      
                       box Box1 #LightBlue
                        participant Foo2
                         participant Bar
                          endbox
                          
                           rect LightCyan
                            foo-->foo++
                             opt condition statement
                              bar-->>bar
                               par parallel section
                                baz<-baz
                                 ref over Baz
                                  reference message
                                   endref
                                    critical Critical part
                                     something happens
                                      else another thing happened
                                       other action
                                        end
                                         try Trying block
                                          doSomething()
                                           catch Exception e
                                            logException(e)
                                             finally alwaysDone()
                                              assert Something is verified
                                               hnote left on link label\nmultiline
                                                rnote over Participant alias multiline\ntext using /n separator
                                                 autonumber <b>[bold] numbering</font></color> format string
                                                  header Page Header
                                                   footer %filename% - page %pageNb%
                                                    legend Legend description
                                                     title This is my own custom title
                                                      caption Caption for this awesome sequence diagram
                                                       skinparam backgroundColor #EEEBDC
                                                        style activityDiagram { BackgroundColor PaleGreen ArrowColor Olive BorderThickness 4 }
                                                         sprite $tux <<generated>> http://plantuml.com/logo-tiny.png [/png/]
                                                          !include https://raw.githubusercontent.com/plantuml-stdlib/C4-PlantUML/master/C4_Container.puml'!define DEVICONS
